title: Sharing
description: Export a tracked account's card (or a group session log) as a standalone file to send to a friend — they can open it here without needing their own API key.

export.title: Export
export.noSelfAccount: No account marked as "yours" — mark a profile as your own from the account switcher to export it.
export.includeNotes: Include my match notes in the export (off by default)

import.title: Import a received card
import.dropHint: Drag and drop a .json file here
